name: coOnDownloadResponse
title: coOnDownloadResponse
tables: Deprecated Function Replaced by CANopen Basic Functions.
void coOnDownloadResponse( dword nodeId, dword index, dword subIndex );
This function is called if the response to a SDO download was received (see coDownload and coDownloadExpedited ).
index Index of the object, value range 1..65.535
subIndex Sub index of the object, value range 0..255
Example void coOnDownloadResponse( dword nodeId, dword index, dword subIndex ){ write( "Download response of [0x%.4x,0x%.2x] from node %d received", index, subIndex, nodeId );}
